home.title: Beer Recommender
home.subtitle: Search and discover amazing beers from around the world

beerList.noResults: No results for "{query}". Try a different search.
beerList.fetchError: Failed to load beers. Please try again.

untappd.appDescription: Get personalized beer recommendations based on your Untappd history
untappd.findUserDescription: Enter your Untappd username to load your beer history and get recommendations
untappd.userNotFound: User not found. Check the username and try again.
untappd.privateUser: This user's profile is private. They need to make their check-ins public.
untappd.missingCredentials: API credentials are not configured. Please configure Untappd API credentials.
untappd.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
untappd.emptyHistory: This user has no checkins. Nothing to recommend from.
untappd.noBeersFound: No beers found matching your filters
untappd.noRecommendations: No recommendations found. Try selecting a different beer.
